description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that triggers on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. Run a ubuntu-latest job to check if the workflow should be skipped due to duplicate actions. If not skipped, run a macos-latest job with a matrix strategy for Release and Debug configurations. In this job, check out the repository, set up ccache, install dependencies with Homebrew, configure CMake, compile dependencies, OSP-Magnum, and unit tests, and finally run the unit tests.
